title: Carriage return and form feed in TEXT fields are returned as 'r' and 'f' in jdbcclient and ResultSets
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, message TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT id, message FROM test WHERE message LIKE '%world%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test WHERE message IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Carriage return and form feed in TEXT fields
